text: It's amazing to see that many procedures in such a variety of resections in such a small period of time.
Coming from a country where we do 160 resections in my institution a year and have been doing vatslobectomy since 2011 and then uniportal for the last year.
So we are ready to go home and continue doing uniportals.
I feel myself very much fortunate coming over here because we know that there are great old famous surgeons working in this hospital.
We can see their work, their activities by a very close association.
And coming over here from the different parts of the world, thoracic surgeons from different countries are making a link between themselves.

We are here in this experimental center to train surgeons from all over the world during these two weeks and today they will perform themselves the lobectomy, the uniportal bath lobectomy, along with our help, with our support.
So this is very important because thanks to this training they can perform themselves the technique, they can learn the tricks in the animal model.
